title: API Route Handler
purpose: Main API route handler that processes incoming HTTP requests and routes them to appropriate handlers based on the request path and method
module_context: This function is the core of the API routing system, handling all incoming requests and delegating to specific handlers for different resource types (diagrams, designs, documents, etc.)

steps.content: Parse the request URL to extract path and query parameters
Identify the request type (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) and route to appropriate handler
Validate session parameters for resource-specific operations
Delegate to specific resource handlers (diagrams, designs, documents, etc.)
Handle errors and return appropriate HTTP responses
